name: Chip Multiselect
description: Toggleable multi-select pill input. Used for interest pickers, category selectors, tag filters — anywhere users pick 3-N from a curated set. Differs from tech-pills (read-only display) by being interactive form input. Each chip toggles a selected state with a bounce-scale and check-icon insertion. Validates via min/max counts.

standard.description: Wrapping flex grid of toggleable pill chips. Selected chips get coral fill + white text + check icon; unselected use border-only treatment. Optional helper text and inline validation message below.

scrollable-row.description: Single horizontal scrolling row variant for spaces too narrow for wrapping. Chips render in a single row with horizontal overflow scroll. Used inline within filter bars or compact forms.

grouped.description: Grouped variant where chips are organized under category headings. Each category has its own ChipGroup. Used when interests span distinct domains (e.g., Music vs Sports vs Food).

visual_brief: A wrapping flex-grid of pill-shaped chips (border-radius: 9999px, padding: 8px 14px). The container fills its parent's width with 8px gaps both horizontally and vertically. Each Chip in unselected state uses a 1.5px border in the muted border color, transparent fill, and the muted text color (var(--d-text-muted)) for the label — minimal visual weight, clearly tappable. On hover, the border darkens slightly and the chip lifts 1px. On tap, the chip transitions to selected state with a spring animation: the border becomes the primary color (coral), the background fills with the primary color, the text color flips to white, AND a 12px Check icon (Lucide) animates in from the left edge with a slight bounce — opacity 0→1 + translateX -4px→0 over 200ms. The chip itself momentarily scales down to 0.94 then springs back to 1.0 over 280ms cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1) — the satisfying tactile bounce. Selected chips can be tapped again to deselect, reversing the animation. Below the chip group, an optional HelperText (text-xs, muted, font-medium) gives context like 'Pick at least 3 interests' or 'Choose up to 5'. To the right of the helper text (or below it on narrow screens), a CountIndicator shows '{n} of {min}–{max}' in font-medium with the active count in primary color when within range, danger color when below min, and warning color when above max. If validation fails (e.g., user submits with too few selected), a ValidationMessage appears below the helper text in danger color with a subtle slide-down entrance.

layout_hints.chip_target: Each chip min 36px tall × 56px wide for tap targets; padding 8px 14px
layout_hints.selected_signal: Three redundant signals: fill, border, AND check icon — important for color-blind accessibility
layout_hints.validation: Inline below the chip grid; min/max defined via data attributes (data-min=N, data-max=N)
layout_hints.scrollbar: If the container has a max-height that triggers vertical scroll, use overflow-y: auto with scrollbar-thin

slots.chip-group: Outer container holding the chip grid + helper + validation. Flex-col, gap 12px. Width fills parent. Carries aria-role='group' and aria-labelledby pointing to the field label (rendered by the parent form).
slots.chip: Repeating slot — one per choice. Pill-shaped button (border-radius: 9999px, padding: 8px 14px, font-size: 14px, font-weight: 500). Flex-row, items-center, gap 6px (gap reserved for the check icon). data-selected: 'true' | 'false'. data-disabled: 'true' | 'false'. Cursor: pointer. Min height 36px. Inactive: border 1.5px solid var(--d-border), background transparent, color var(--d-text-muted). Active: applies the swipecircle-chip-selected decorator (or theme equivalent) — border + background var(--d-primary), color white. On press: scale(0.94) for 80ms, spring back to scale(1) over 220ms cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1).
slots.check-icon: 12px Lucide Check icon, conditionally rendered when data-selected=true. Color white. On chip activation, animates in: opacity 0→1 + translateX(-4px)→0 over 200ms cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1). Sits at the left edge of the chip content, before the label.
slots.helper-text: Single-line text below the chip group. font-size 12px, color var(--d-text-muted), font-weight 500. Content: 'Pick at least 3 interests' or 'Choose up to 5 categories' — describes the selection requirement.
slots.count-indicator: Inline span next to or below helper text. font-size 12px, font-weight 600. Format: '{count} of {min}–{max}' (e.g., '2 of 3–5'). Color: var(--d-primary) when count is within range, var(--d-danger) when below min, var(--d-warning) when above max.
slots.validation-message: Conditionally rendered below helper-text. Visible only when validation fails. font-size 12px, color var(--d-danger), font-weight 500. Animates in via opacity 0→1 + translateY(-4px)→0 over 200ms ease-out. Includes the role='alert' aria attribute for screen readers.

keyboard: Tab: focus the chip group, then individual chips
Arrow Right / Arrow Down: focus next chip
Arrow Left / Arrow Up: focus previous chip
Space or Enter: toggle selected state of focused chip
announcements: Minimum {min} interests required. {needed} more to continue.
accessibility.focus_management: Each chip is independently tabbable (tabindex=0). The selection state is announced via aria-pressed='true|false' on each chip button. The count indicator uses aria-live='polite' so screen readers announce changes after each toggle.

mobile.notes: Wrapping grid with chips sized to content. On narrow screens, chips wrap naturally to multiple rows. Tap target min 44×44 (achieved via padding).

tablet.notes: Same as mobile with slightly more breathing room.

desktop.notes: More chips per row visible. Hover states active.

micro.chip-press: scale(0.94) for 80ms then spring back to scale(1) over 220ms cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1)
micro.chip-hover: translateY(-1px) + border darken over 160ms ease-out (inactive only)

transitions.chip-toggle: Background and border colors transition together over 200ms ease-out. The check icon's translate creates the satisfying 'snap-in' feel.
transitions.validation-appear: Validation message slides in from translateY(-4px) opacity 0 to translateY(0) opacity 1 over 200ms ease-out
